---
title: "Datasets"
output: rmarkdown::html_vignette
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{Datasets}
  %\VignetteEngine{knitr::rmarkdown}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
---

```{r, include = FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  collapse = TRUE,
  comment = "#>"
)
```

```{r, eval=FALSE}
library(REDCapSync)
```

Start by loading an exisiting or test project. There are two named datasets by default: REDCapSync and REDCapSync_raw.

```{r, eval=FALSE}
project <- load_project(project_name = "TEST_CLASSIC")

dataset <- project$load_dataset("REDCapSync")
```
